top_candidates.reasoning: The closing 'therefore' that pivots from doctrinal argument to imperative action — 'pick up the migration ticket, finish the runbook, ship the successor. After this verse, the chapter pivots to duty' — is the structural signature of tasmāt sarvāṇi bhūtāni na tvaṁ śocitum arhasi. The recapitulation of the previous twenty verses (clothing, body-replacement, unmanifest-bracket) is the bridge-coda function of 2.30.
Closing-coda theme appears in 2.25 (tasmād evaṁ viditvā nānuśocitum arhasi) but 2.25 closes the inner imperishable cluster while 2.30 closes the entire 2.11-2.30 sāṅkhya block.
Tasmāt-style closing also appears in 2.27 but with different scope — 2.27 closes the materialist concession; 2.30 closes the whole imperishable doctrine.
